target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle is completely burned out with no intact components; cab roof and windows are missing; chassis and wheels are charred and deformed; consistent with catastrophic (K-kill) damage.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: The vehicle exhibits catastrophic damage with completely melted and collapsed cab structure; all windows are missing; chassis is severely warped and scorched; no functional components remain visible.

target_2.brief_supporting_logic: The vehicle exhibits catastrophic damage: cab is completely burned out, chassis is exposed and twisted, wheels are missing or destroyed, and all exterior components are charred and non-functional; consistent with K-kill status.

summary: Three military vehicles are assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence, each exhibiting catastrophic (K-kill) damage including burned-out cabs, missing windows, and non-functional chassis. The scene depicts a row of severely damaged military trucks, all charred and stripped of operational components, lying in a scorched, debris-strewn area. The overall scene indicates complete loss of functional military capability for all assessed targets.
